about_story_p1: TechStore started in 2015 as a small electronics store in downtown Kyiv. From the very beginning, we strived to provide our customers not just products, but comprehensive solutions and quality service.
about_story_p2: Today, TechStore is a leading online electronics store in Ukraine with a wide range of smartphones, laptops, gadgets and accessories from world brands. We serve over 100,000 customers annually and continue to grow.
about_mission_p1: Make the most modern technologies accessible to every Ukrainian. We believe that quality electronics should not be a luxury, but should be available at a fair price.
about_mission_p2: Our goal is not just to sell gadgets, but to help people find technological solutions that will truly improve their lives, work and leisure.
about_value_quality_text: We work only with official suppliers and guarantee the authenticity of every product.
about_value_trust_text: Honesty and transparency in everything - from prices to warranty terms. No hidden fees.
about_value_innovation_text: Always up to date with the latest technological trends and electronics news.
about_team_description: Professionals who love their work and are always ready to help
modal_success_text: Your message has been sent successfully. We'll contact you soon.

compare_warning_hint: For accurate comparison, keep only one type of product (for example, case with case or band with band).
